title: Remove PDF Metadata — Strip Hidden Author Data Offline
h1: Strip All Hidden Metadata from PDF Files Instantly
description: Remove author names, company info, GPS locations, and revision history from PDFs entirely in your browser. No upload. Perfect for Berlin users.

sections.title: Why Strip PDF Metadata?
sections.content: PDFs carry hidden metadata — your name, your company, revision history. Strip it all before sharing publicly, entirely offline.

sections.title: Before & After — How Metadata Removal Works

steps.title: Open Your PDF
steps.description: Select the PDF with hidden metadata to remove.

steps.title: Preview Hidden Data
steps.description: See exactly what metadata — author, GPS, history — is embedded.

steps.title: Strip & Download Clean PDF
steps.description: Remove all metadata instantly and save a clean, anonymous PDF.

sections.title: Metadata Privacy Tool for Berlin Professionals
sections.content: Journalists, legal professionals, and privacy-conscious users in Berlin strip metadata before publishing or sharing PDFs externally.

sections.title: All Metadata Types Permanently Erased
sections.content: Author name, company, GPS coordinates from embedded images, revision history, software fingerprints — all permanently removed.

sections.title: Strip Metadata in Milliseconds
sections.content: Metadata removal takes milliseconds and often reduces file size by 10–15%. All offline.

faqs.a: Author, creator, producer, title, keywords, and all XMP/EXIF data.
No, bookmarks and structure are preserved; only metadata is removed.

faqs.q: Can I preview the metadata first?
faqs.a: Yes, we show a list of all detected metadata before removing.
No, the content, images, and structure remain intact.
